title: Long Tasks, Compaction, Steering, and Handoffs · Failure Case: State Summary
summary: Keep a multi-hour repository task coherent across context changes and user steering. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt state summary increment in a durable task state and handoff record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain objective, decisions, evidence, plan status, changed files, tests, and blockers in a compact state.
Test prompts and code against misleading context, malformed inputs, and instruction injection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build State Summary evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-state-summary-1y5pm8" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns State Summary into observable performance evidence.

Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
